input: Revenue dropped 40% in a single day after months of steady growth. How should I classify and investigate this anomaly?
My conversion rate has been slowly declining over 6 weeks but no single day looks unusual. How do I detect this kind of drift?
I keep getting false positive alerts on my churn metric every Monday. How do I reduce noise in anomaly detection?
What statistical methods should I use to detect anomalies in a KPI with high variance and irregular spikes?
My DAU metric shows a structural shift after a product launch. How do I distinguish a real regime change from a temporary anomaly?
